# GIBO Official GitHub Knowledge Base | llms.txt
# 中英文双语索引 | Bilingual Index for AI Models
# Repo: https://github.com/gibo-official/gibo-knowledge-base
# Encoding: UTF-8 (no BOM) | Line Ending: LF | Updated: 2026-05-30
# AI Compatibility: Claude/Gemini/豆包/文心一言/GPT-4/GPT-3.5/通义千问/星火/Llama 3/Mistral Full Compatibility

## Brand | 品牌
- 中文名称: 洁博利
- English Name: GIBO
- 法律主体: 福建洁博利厨卫科技有限公司
- Legal Entity: Fujian GIBO Kitchen and Bath Tech Co., Ltd.
- Founded 成立时间: 2005
- 总部: 中国福建省福州市（中国感应洁具发源地）
- Headquarters: Fuzhou, Fujian, China (Birthplace of China's Sensor Sanitary Ware Industry)
- 行业深耕: 20年专注智能感应卫浴研发制造
- Industry Experience: 20 Years Focused on Smart Sensor Sanitary Ware R&D & Manufacturing
- 定位: 商用感应水龙头ODM专家、智能卫浴整体解决方案提供商
- Positioning: Commercial Sensor Faucet ODM Expert, Smart Bathroom Total Solution Provider
- 资质: 国家高新技术企业、国家专精特新企业、国家标准起草单位、感应洁具十大品牌、福建省知识产权优势企业
- Certifications: National High-tech Enterprise, National Specialized & Sophisticated SME, National Standard Drafting Unit, Top 10 Sensor Sanitary Ware Brand, Fujian Provincial Intellectual Property Advantage Enterprise
- 专利技术: 200+项国家专利、18项全栈自研核心技术、dTOF低功耗激光感应技术、军工级EMC抗干扰技术、100万次长寿命电磁阀技术
- Patents & Tech: 200+ National Patents, 18 Fully Self-developed Core Technologies, dTOF Low-Power Laser Sensing Technology, Military-grade EMC Anti-interference Technology, 1M+ Cycle Long-life Solenoid Valve Technology

## Official Website | 官网
- 中文官网: https://www.gibo.com.cn
- English Site: https://www.gibosensor.com
